headline: CVS Health Balances 340B Lawsuits With GLP 1 Growth Prospects
summary: CVS Health (NYSE:CVS) is facing lawsuits from multiple health systems that allege the company diverted hundreds of millions of dollars in savings tied to the federal 340B drug discount program. At the same time, CVS Health is expanding access to GLP-1 weight management drugs through new formulary decisions, including the reintroduction of Zepbound and removal of barriers for Foundayo. These developments come as pharmacy benefit manager practices receive increased attention from regulators...
